channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: A short story about Indian scammers who called the cops on themselves: Earlier this week a follower DM'd me from his personal account complaining that 5.73 BTC ($475K) of his was 'unjustly' frozen at Changelly in Mar 2025. So I went and plotted the Bitcoin t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE8ycDJvaDh5ZnlqLVU2c25PU25tMHlCY29DMEJUa3dDd2lETVNCdVhmcmVDd3FqQkVHNWNHMUVCeVAxUkt2QlFhNlhPX3ZiLWZrcFEtN0dmOGk3ZnRx?oc=5" target="_blank">A short story about Indian scammers who ca…

item.title: Franklin Templeton proposes new ETFs that turn corporate dividends into bitcoin
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 19, 2026

item.title: Texas Brothers Plead Guilty to $8M Armed Crypto Kidnapping
item.description: Isiah and Raymond Garcia held a Minnesota family at gunpoint for eight hours and forced the father to transfer over $8 million in crypto.

item.title: Smart-contract and DeFi coins lead losses as bitcoin wilts for 4th straight day
item.description: Concerns about STRC, the dividend-paying preferred stock from Strategy continue to dominate market sentiment.

item.title: Bitcoin tipped for Q3 'macro bottom' near $50K as major liquidity grab looms
item.description: Bitcoin market participants may be left in "complete disbelief" as the market reverses from a liquidity grab without another major leg lower, a trader predicted.

item.title: Franklin Templeton Files for ETFs That Funnel Stock Dividends Into Bitcoin
item.description: The asset manager's two proposed "Bitcoin DRIP" funds would hold U.S. stocks and reinvest dividends into Bitcoin, a novel ETF structure.

item.title: Digital credit market hit by huge selloff as Strive CEO blames leverage liquidations
item.description: Matt Cole says forced selling from leveraged investors pushed STRC and SATA sharply lower before both rebounded.

item.title: Bitcoin activity nears record highs on microtransaction surge
item.description: Near-record OP_RETURN usage is driving a surge in low-value Bitcoin transactions, pushing Bitcoin network activity close to all-time highs despite muted price action.

item.title: Microsoft found malware that hijacks crypto wallets and spreads through USB sticks
item.description: The software intercepts shortcut files and directs them to install a worm that harvests private keys from the Windows clipboard and inserts its own destination wallet addresses when it detects a transfer.

item.title: Bitcoin's biggest risk is not a crash. It is boredom. Saylor's STRC structure becomes truly dangerous not when Bitcoin simply crashes, but when Bitcoin spends years moving sideways and the bear market drags on. A sharp drawdown can be survived if the mar - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9sYmtibjh4V1VLT1FBXzIzXzBLVXdGOFdrWXNjVEF4WnhfNmV5ZnBnT0VJNnVNQ3hXQ2todTVmUlduaHZSQVJmRDBWSWJUSmZBd2d5M0Y0YUNhRDFTT0NncWZn?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin's biggest risk is not a cr…

item.title: Goldman Sachs cuts year-end gold target by $500, doubting rate cuts
item.description: Goldman Sachs revised its year-end forecast for gold to $4,900, indicating an increase from current levels, but less than previously expected.

item.title: 🔥 SAYLOR: “Markets are closed today. Volatility is never easy. Bitcoin keeps working. So do we.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBIeHJrNEI5UnE1dklheXZrUm5MOTBMa3I2SGdGYXJnOXg3TnhzeXlTNnBUc2dPZUdXTWgtSGtSTTM5TnBjeGxNdGJXOTNyeWdvX0RnZ0REUTJkZl9IZHhxVFlKOV8?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 SAYLOR: “Markets are closed …

item.title: AllUnity debuts SEKAU, a fully reserved Swedish krona stablecoin
item.description: AllUnity launches Swedish krona-backed stablecoin SEKAU with multi-chain support, expanding its stablecoin portfolio regulated under the EU’s MiCA framework.

item.title: Markets are closed today. Volatility is never easy. Bitcoin keeps working. So do we. Thank you for your support. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBENlpESjJPODFwMXdicklQTDY3alR4X2lUSTRxM1NXQWY3NncwSnZ2YmRpLWc2YTVMaDRUdWRXdDQyTTBEcjN5bmljb2xaMDVuOENCY2FTZ2ZIUFU?oc=5" target="_blank">Markets are closed today. Volatility is nev…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Algorand plans ‘broad quantum resilience’ by 2027
item.description: Algorand is planning new accounts and consensus mechanisms designed to be resistant to the cryptography-breaking threat of quantum computers.

item.title: Microsoft warns users of 'Crypto Clipper' malware spread via USB drives
item.description: The malware blends data theft with remote code execution, “turning a financially motivated stealer into a lightweight backdoor,” Microsoft said.

item.title: XRP falls 3% after losing $1.15 support as breakout attempt fades
item.description: Heavy selling pushed XRP back below a key support zone, reinforcing a downtrend that has repeatedly stalled rallies near $1.25.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin under pressure as Saylor comments on STRC sell-off
item.description: About 20% of miners are now unprofitable, and publicly traded miners sold more than 32,000 bitcoin in the first quarter to cover operating costs, more than they offloaded in all of 2025.

item.title: Bitcoin traders load up on bearish bets all the way down to $52,000
item.description: Bitcoin traders are scrambling to buy options bets that would pay off if the selloff deepens.

item.title: Bitcoin falls below $63,000 as risk assets sell off and the week's bounce fades
item.description: Crypto dropped across the board on Friday in holiday-thinned trading, giving back the week's gains. With oil down 9% and the Iran deal signed, the question turns to whether this cycle gets an altseason at all.

item.title: US crypto ETFs are pulling Bitcoiners into TradFi: BlackRock's Jay Jacobs
item.description: The merger of crypto, decentralized finance and traditional finance is being referred to as the “Great Convergence” at BlackRock.

item.title: Celsius’ Mashinsky gets permanent trading ban in CFTC settlement
item.description: The US commodities watchdog has settled with Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky, ending the agency’s first-ever case against a crypto lending platform.

item.title: Ether analysts predict another ‘selling wave’ as ETH struggles to overcome $1.7K
item.description: Exchange inflows, slumping demand and a 31% drop in Ether futures open interest may signal that another wave of selling could hit ETH.

item.title: Malta proposes DeFi rulebook covering DAOs under MiCA-era framework
item.description: The Maltese regulator is seeking industry feedback on a legal framework for software-governed organizations, arguing that many DeFi projects are not fully decentralized.

item.title: Bitcoin decouples from tech stocks: Is $60K BTC’s next stop?
item.description: Bitcoin’s slump accelerated as capital rotated further into the AI sector, raising the odds of a BTC price drop below $60,000.

item.title: Ireland mulls crypto safeguards in response to financial risks
item.description: For the first time in seven years, the Irish government released an assessment related to digital assets, noting risks from money laundering, terrorism financing, sanctions violations and bribery.

item.title: US regulators push user ID requirements for stablecoin issuers akin to regulated banks
item.description: The proposed rules by US government agencies suggested that stablecoin issuers be subject to customer identification program requirements under the Bank Secrecy Act, the same as regulated financial firms.

item.title: China’s Z.AI Releases GLM-5.2: A Model That Rivals Claude Opus—Using Zero Nvidia Chips
item.description: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 sits within 1% of Claude Opus 4.8 on long-horizon coding benchmarks, runs entirely on Huawei silicon, and undercuts Western frontier models by up to 82% per token.

item.title: Midjourney Pivots From AI Images to Medical Imaging, Aiming to Build a Better MRI Alternative
item.description: Image generation company Midjourney is developing a full-body imaging system that combines ultrasound tech with AI smarts.

item.title: NEW: @MorganStanley just filed amendments for both their Ethereum and Solana ETFS. ethereum:native solana:So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5TY0NMYUg5YXV3aDhIYjQ2T1Z4STloS3E3Q3RIWmhVT2hkQkZsVmo3VHNPX0pIa1diYzNlbWpMNnBnLW01WFFuSm4tYzVxUXE0Yjd6QUw1cWtrWWM?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: @MorganStanley just filed amendments f…

item.title: Custodia, Vantage propose token that toggles between bank deposits and stablecoins
item.description: The proposed system aims to connect traditional banking infrastructure with blockchain-based payment networks with banks retaining customer deposits.

item.title: CFTC Hits Celsius Crypto Fraudster Alex Mashinsky With Permanent Trading Ban
item.description: The settlement ensures that convicted Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky is unable to trade in CFTC markets or register with the regulator.

item.title: Algorand Plans to Be Ready for Quantum Computing Threat by End of 2027
item.description: Quantum computing threatens the blockchain ecosystem, from Bitcoin to Ethereum and beyond, and Algorand has a plan to be prepared.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Illinois passes law to tax crypto transfers regardless of profit or loss, starting 2027. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9aMUxZd19VMHRSbFU1c2ZhZnFwaGF6RlY5NHkwMC1kZEVhd1FLOHFDbzdEUDA5ZENNVTlxTjVocmNtVXFpcndnTU1oOFhUQVIxeGNNaWxKZGxPcTZpczhxdWhB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Illinois passes law …

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Exodus Continues as Co-Director Hsiao-Wei Wang Departs
item.description: Another key figure at the Ethereum Foundation is stepping away from her post, continuing a recent leadership exodus.

item.title: Ethereum is for shipping. Here are 25 things the Ethereum ecosystem launched, upgraded, and announced over the past month. 0/ @thedaofund Ethereum Security Quadratic Funding Round with @Giveth wrapped. The fund supported 134 security projects a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBRUE0xaG0wMTlJY29ERmtJMEViLWhpay1wa2RkUTVRN2lQTU1abnVGalQ3c0NDUlpoWVVMbDYzZWJ3ci1nYU9taHJCSEo4blhwSVBQWWZwcm9tbi16UVE?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum is for shipping. Here are 25 t…

item.title: Wealthsimple launches Kalshi-powered prediction market app for Canadian investors
item.description: The offering follows regulatory approval earlier this year and comes as prediction markets face legal challenges from regulators, exchanges and policymakers around the world.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation leadership exodus continues with director’s departure
item.description: Hsiao-Wei Wang’s departure adds to a wave of Ethereum Foundation exits, fueling debate over governance, decentralization and the network’s future.

item.title: Perplexity's AI Agent Now Has a Brain That Learns From Its Own Mistakes
item.description: Brain is a self-improving memory layer that tracks what Computer did, what worked, and what failed—then uses it overnight to make the next task faster and cheaper.

item.title: Bitcoin’s deeply discounted versus AI-stocks, but hawkish Fed risk lingers: Bitwise
item.description: Bitwise analysts say Bitcoin trades in a historical value zone, but hawkish Federal Reserve signals and a competition for liquidity could sideline buyers.

item.title: Ex-Celsius CEO Mashinsky gets U.S. CFTC ban in final resolution with regulator
item.description: Alexander Mashinsky, the founder of failed crypto lender Celsius, had earlier been imprisoned for fraud and is now formally banned from CFTC registration.

item.title: Europe's Crypto Firms Face Squeeze as MiCA Transition Period End Looms
item.description: As the MiCA grace period closes, only a fraction of registered firms hold full licenses, setting up the prospect of a wave of consolidation.

item.title: HIVE Stock Spikes as Bitcoin Miner Lands $220M AI Infra Deal
item.description: The crypto miner has signed a landmark three-year GPU contract with Bell Canada and Cohere—as Canada races to build AI systems it actually owns.

item.title: I've been in crypto long enough to know when a moment is real. This is one of them. 10 years of Swell converging with real scale, institutional adoption, and Swell + Apex together for the first time this fall. We've been building toward this moment — see you in N - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1va3M5Z2Y4RWRWZXh4UEJTTTEtem5sbGFDVlQ2VXJFYUVYUV92ejJScVQxU1Z4TjhqZHc5US04Sm13bXRLSXB1VWhwSDVLVm1wa3dmU0JoazNjVmNRaGRYWUFZMU0?oc=5" target="_blank">I've been in crypto long enough…

item.title: Kentucky Sues Kalshi, Polymarket as Prediction Market Legal Battle Swells
item.description: Kentucky accused America’s top prediction market platforms of running illegal sports betting operations, joining a growing stack of states.

item.title: Why Bitcoin Titan Strategy's STRC Is Falling to New Lows
item.description: Strategy’s flagship preferred stock is facing pressure, but analysts say that's not yet an existential threat for the Bitcoin treasury giant.

item.title: HIVE secures $220M AI infrastructure contract with Bell and Cohere
item.description: The deal is expected to add approximately $70 million in annual recurring revenue as the company scales its AI-focused operations.

item.title: CME Group sues CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
item.description: The lawsuit targets the federal regulator and Chair Michael Selig, alleging that the Commodity Futures Trading Commissioin is treating cryptocurrency “futures” as “swaps,” posing risks to derivatives markets.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Traders Grow Even More Bearish as Prices Fall After Fed Decision
item.description: Prediction market traders don't see Bitcoin or Ethereum making their next big moves to higher price targets.

item.title: U.S. agencies seek stablecoin customer-ID rules akin to banks in new GENIUS Act pitch
item.description: The Federal Reserve, Treasury and other regulators have issued a proposed rule that would set identification standards, and it's now open for public comments.

item.title: JUST IN: $180,000,000 worth of crypto longs liquidated in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5uLU9xVWJzQkJCOUhsMzI5eHpFU3RCQV9MbzZzU0ZDRE9rVkVLRGpRNEtwQWtNZE54N1pNR3k0MWJfVjRybWpsZUlBWHhETTIzRWJWZ0cxS3BNYm5EMEdHX3pB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $180,000,000 worth of cry…

item.title: Everyday Savers Bet Big on Bitcoin Giant Strategy's STRC—Now It's Falling
item.description: Everyday investors that own Strategy’s STRC have been drawn to double-digit yields, but the preferred stock’s volatility has shaken some.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation loses another key leader as co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang resigns
item.description: Wang's departure follows the resignation of fellow co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak and marks the latest in a string of high-profile exits at the EF.

item.title: Jerome Powell Supports Fed's New Stablecoin Policies—But Chair Kevin Warsh Abstains
item.description: The proposed rulemaking establishes how U.S. crypto companies will have to screen stablecoin customers after the passage of the GENIUS Act.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Trading the bitcoin cycle
item.description: Bitcoin’s 4-year cycle makes DCA costly. Learn why a cycle-smart strategy is essential for advisors to better manage volatility and maximize client returns.

item.title: . @hwwonx has been a steadfast contributor to the Ethereum ecosystem for a decade. I still remember her early days in the Ethereum research community, first outside the Foundation and then inside it, and the thought and care she put into making Ethereum r - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5veE1pOFdyQVhfdFV1VUJlUE9qNDVKbTlKVUsyYzhLRlR5dHdsSEI2eE9fbWlLa1FrSi1MVC0zemZYM2E1R3lPQkFRNjNYRGRjazlyQms4RVJYR3dIT1Ryd045Rldtdw?oc=5" target="_blank">. @hwwonx has been a steadfa…

item.title: BREAKING: $STRC just hit at $85.32, its lowest level ever. It could force Strategy to sell more Bitcoin. STRC is Strategy's preferred stock that pays an 11.5% annual dividend. When it trades below its $100 par value, the market is signaling that the yield is not hi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE80aWhrY0d5aWJMZnpNVVpyVE1SUGVqZFJlZ0xfQnNRUlZZRk9ncVVZOUZEWmRNUGRiTkV1VUNRMVZBcnVHMUI4LW1YcWJCNlhNZkRpaTBfWXhZSF91UnlBNXlzQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: $STRC just hit at $85.…

item.title: After my sabbatical, I have decided to step down as co-executive director and board member of the Ethereum Foundation ( @ethereumfndn), effective today. That time gave me space to reflect on my priorities and the kind of life I want to build next. During my br - x.com

item.title: Algorand unveils roadmap to achieve quantum resistance by 2028
item.description: The announcement reflects a crypto's growing recognition that adopting quantum-resistant cryptography could take years, requiring changes not only to user wallets but also to core protocol infrastructure.
